title: AI for Small Business
subtitle: Ready-to-Deploy AI Systems That Run Your Business While You Sleep

sections.title: Welcome
sections.content: YOUR BUSINESS DOESN'T NEED MORE AI ADVICE. IT NEEDS AI SYSTEMS. You've read the articles. You've tried the prompts. But here's what nobody tells you: using AI for one task at a time is like hiring an employee and only letting them answer one question per day. This playbook is different. Instead of scattered prompts, you get complete business systems — tested workflows where AI handles entire processes from start to finish. Each system comes with ready-to-use templates you customize once, then run forever.

what_most_people_do: Ask AI one question at a time
Waste 2+ hours daily on repetitive tasks
what_this_playbook_gives_you: Systems that run in under 15 minutes

sections.title: How to Use This Playbook
sections.content: Three-step guide to deploying AI systems in your business.

items.title: Pick a System
items.instruction: Start with your biggest time-waster. Each system stands alone.

items.title: Fill in Your Details
items.instruction: Every template has [BRACKETS] for your business info. Fill once, use forever.

items.title: Deploy & Repeat
items.instruction: Use the system daily — AI remembers your context and gets better over time.

sections.title: Chapter 01: The AI Business Profile
sections.content: Fill this in ONCE. Every system in this playbook uses it.

customers.primary_customer: [Who buys from you? Age, role, situation]

operations.biggest_time_waster: [The task that eats most of your week]
operations.software_you_use: [List your tools — POS, CRM, email, etc.]

how_to_use_profile.instruction: Copy your completed Business Profile into a Claude Project as the project instruction. Every conversation in that project will automatically know your business.
Paste your profile at the start of any Gemini Gem instruction. The Gem becomes a specialist that already knows who you are.
Every system in this playbook references [YOUR PROFILE] — that means this template. Fill it once and all 6 systems auto-customize to your business.

sections.pro_tip: Update your Business Profile quarterly as your business evolves. Your prices change, your customers shift, your tools upgrade — keep this document alive and every AI system stays current.

sections.title: System 01: Customer Response System
sections.problem: You spend 1-2 hours daily writing similar emails and messages
sections.solution: A system that drafts responses in your brand voice in under 60 seconds
whats_inside: 8 ready-to-use response templates (all fully written out)
Claude Skill + Gemini Gem setup instructions
AI prompts to customize any response

response_templates.name: New Inquiry / First Contact
response_templates.scenario: Someone contacts you for the first time
response_templates.trigger: New email, DM, or form submission
response_templates.template:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thanks so much for reaching out to [YOUR BUSINESS]!

I'd love to help you with [restate their question/need].

Here's a quick overview of what we offer:
[YOUR TOP 2-3 SERVICES/PRODUCTS with 1-line descriptions]

Would you like to [get a quote]? I'm happy to help you find the right fit.

Looking forward to connecting,
[YOUR NAME]
[YOUR PREFERRED CONTACT METHOD]

response_templates.name: Pricing Question
response_templates.trigger: Customer asks 'how much' or 'what do you charge'
response_templates.template:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thanks for your interest in [YOUR BUSINESS]!

Here's our pricing for [what they asked about]:
[Price details from YOUR product/service list]

What makes us different: [YOUR COMPETITOR DIFFERENCE]

Happy to answer any other questions —
[YOUR PREFERRED CONTACT METHOD]

[YOUR NAME]

response_templates.name: Complaint / Negative Feedback
response_templates.scenario: Customer is unhappy or reports a problem
response_templates.trigger: Complaint email, negative review, angry message
response_templates.template:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you for letting us know about this. I'm really sorry you had this experience — that's not the standard we hold ourselves to at [YOUR BUSINESS].

Here's what I'd like to do to make this right:
[Specific remedy: refund / redo / discount / replacement]

I've also [updated our process / personally reviewed what happened] so this doesn't happen again.

Can I [call you / schedule a time to chat] to make sure you're fully taken care of?

[YOUR NAME]

response_templates.name: Follow-Up (No Response)
response_templates.scenario: You reached out but haven't heard back
response_templates.trigger: 3-5 days since last contact with no reply
response_templates.template:
Hi [Customer Name],

Just checking in — I wanted to make sure my last message didn't get buried in your inbox!

To recap, you asked about [their original question], and I'd shared [brief summary of your response].

If you have any other questions or if your needs have changed, I'm here to help. No pressure at all.

Have a great [day of week]!
[YOUR NAME]

response_templates.name: Booking / Appointment Confirmation
response_templates.scenario: Customer books an appointment or reservation
response_templates.template:
Hi [Customer Name],

You're all set! Here are your booking details:

Date: [DATE]
Time: [TIME]
Location: [ADDRESS / virtual link]
Service: [WHAT THEY BOOKED]

A few things to know before your visit:
- [Preparation info: what to bring, parking, etc.]
- [Cancellation/reschedule policy]

If anything changes, just reply to this message or call us at [PHONE]. We look forward to seeing you!

[YOUR NAME] at [YOUR BUSINESS]

response_templates.name: Thank You / Post-Purchase
response_templates.scenario: Customer just made a purchase or completed service
response_templates.template:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you for choosing [YOUR BUSINESS]! We truly appreciate your [purchase / visit / business].

Just a quick summary:
[Order details / service summary / receipt reference]

A few things that might be helpful:
- [Care instructions / next steps / how to get support]
- [Warranty / return policy reminder]

If you enjoyed your experience, we'd love a quick review on [Google / Yelp / your platform]: [REVIEW LINK]

Thanks again — hope to see you back soon!
[YOUR NAME]

response_templates.name: Refund / Cancellation Request
response_templates.scenario: Customer wants a refund or to cancel
response_templates.template:
Hi [Customer Name],

I understand, and I appreciate you letting us know.

I've started processing your [refund / cancellation]. Here's what to expect:
- [Timeline: refund in 5-7 business days / etc.]
- [Any conditions or next steps they need to take]

If you don't mind me asking — was there anything we could have done differently? Your feedback helps us improve for everyone.

You're always welcome back at [YOUR BUSINESS].

[YOUR NAME]

response_templates.name: Review Request
response_templates.scenario: You want to ask a happy customer for a review
response_templates.trigger: 1-3 days after positive interaction or purchase
response_templates.template:
Hi [Customer Name],

It was great [helping you with ___] recently!

If you have 30 seconds, a quick review would mean the world to us. It helps other people like you find us:

[REVIEW LINK — Google / Yelp / Facebook / your platform]

No pressure at all — and thank you again for choosing [YOUR BUSINESS]. We're here whenever you need us!

[YOUR NAME]

escalation_decision_tree.action: AI drafts, quick review, then send
AI drafts, YOU review before sending

sections.pro_tip: Set a rule: if the customer's issue involves money, emotions, or legal risk — always have a human review before sending. AI is great at drafting, but judgment calls need you.

time_savings.after: Under 10 minutes — AI drafts, you approve

claude.role: You are a customer response specialist for [YOUR BUSINESS NAME].
claude.context: Use the Business Profile attached to this project to understand our brand, customers, and tone.
rules: Always match our brand tone: [BRAND TONE]
Never make promises about pricing or timelines without checking the product/service list
workflow: Identify the scenario type (pricing, complaint, etc.)
Use the matching template from the library

gemini.instructions: You are a customer response specialist for [YOUR BUSINESS NAME]. Use the Business Profile in my instructions to understand our brand. When I paste a customer message, identify the type (pricing, complaint, review request, etc.) and draft a response using our brand tone: [BRAND TONE]. Keep it under 150 words. Flag complaints for review.

quick_use_prompts.label: AI Prompt (Claude / Gemini)
quick_use_prompts.prompt: Using my Business Profile, draft a response to this customer message: [paste message]. Identify which scenario it is (new inquiry, pricing, complaint, follow-up, booking, thank you, refund, or review request) and use the matching template. Match my brand tone. Keep it under 100 words.

quick_use_prompts.label: Review Response Prompt (Claude / Gemini)
quick_use_prompts.prompt: A customer left this negative review: [paste review]. Draft a public response that (1) acknowledges their concern, (2) apologizes sincerely, (3) offers a specific remedy, and (4) invites them to continue the conversation privately. Match my brand tone: [BRAND TONE].

quick_use_prompts.label: Batch Follow-Up Prompt (Claude / Gemini)
quick_use_prompts.prompt: I need to follow up with [X] customers who haven't responded. Here are their names and original inquiries: [paste list]. For each, draft a brief, friendly follow-up using Template 4. Personalize each one based on their original question.

sections.title: System 02: Content & Social Media
sections.problem: Content creation takes 5+ hours/week and still feels inconsistent
sections.solution: A batch system that produces a full week of branded content in one sitting
whats_inside: 30-minute batch workflow (a full week of content)
AI prompts for both Claude and Gemini

content_pillar_framework.description: Stop guessing what to post. These 4 pillars give you a rotation system that keeps content varied, on-brand, and engaging.

pillars.name: Behind the Scenes
pillars.description: How we do it, workspace tours, process reveals, day-in-the-life

pillars.name: Customer Results
pillars.description: Testimonials, before-after, case studies, success stories

pillars.name: Education & Tips
pillars.description: How-to's, tips your audience needs, myth-busting, FAQs

pillars.name: Personality & Culture
pillars.description: Team introductions, values, humor, what makes you human

batch_workflow.title: The 30-Minute Batch Workflow
batch_workflow.description: One sitting. One week of content.

steps.detail: Paste Business Profile + this week's theme. (2 min)
Ask AI for 5 ideas using Pillar rotation. (3 min)
Convert best post into email newsletter. (5 min)

batch_workflow.ai_prompt: Using my Business Profile, create 5 social media post concepts for this week. Use the 4-pillar rotation. Theme: [YOUR THEME]. For each: headline, 2-sentence description, suggested visual, and best platform.

structure.body: [2-3 short paragraphs, one idea per paragraph]
structure.cta: [What you want them to do — save, share, comment]

platform_templates.ai_prompt: Write an Instagram [carousel/post/story] about [TOPIC] for my [INDUSTRY] business. Use my brand tone: [BRAND TONE]. Hook them with the first line.

platform_templates.format: Engagement Post / Event Promo / Review Share

structure.opening: [Personal story or question to spark comments]

platform_templates.ai_prompt: Write a Facebook [engagement post/event promo] about [TOPIC]. Make it conversational. Ask a question to drive comments. Match my brand tone: [BRAND TONE].

structure.insight: [What you learned or what others should know]

platform_templates.ai_prompt: Write a LinkedIn post about [TOPIC] from my perspective as a [YOUR ROLE] in [INDUSTRY]. Professional but authentic tone.

structure.body: [One main story/tip from this week's best post]

platform_templates.ai_prompt: Turn this social media post into a weekly email newsletter: [paste post]. Add a personal intro, expand the content, and end with one clear CTA.

sections.title: System 03: Financial Analysis & Reporting
sections.problem: You know your revenue but not your real profitability drivers
sections.solution: Monthly financial health checks that take 15 minutes
whats_inside: AI prompts to turn your numbers into insights

monthly_health_check_template.ai_prompt: Analyze this month's data against last month. Identify: (1) top revenue driver, (2) biggest cost increase, (3) customer retention rate, (4) three specific actions to improve next month. Be direct — I'm a busy owner.

pricing_analysis_template.description: Most small businesses underprice. This template helps you evaluate whether your pricing is right.
pricing_analysis_template.ai_prompt: Review my pricing data above. Compare my margins to industry averages for [INDUSTRY]. Analyze my competitor positioning. Recommend: should I raise prices, by how much, and how to communicate the increase. Give me a specific plan.
pricing_analysis_template.pro_tip: Run this analysis quarterly. Most small businesses haven't raised prices in 2+ years while costs have increased 15-20%. A 10% price increase with zero customer loss goes straight to your bottom line.

cash_flow_forecast_template.description: See the future before it arrives. This 3-month template helps you spot cash crunches before they hit.
cash_flow_forecast_template.ai_prompt: Using my cash flow data and my Business Profile (peak season: [PEAK SEASON]), identify: (1) months where cash might run low, (2) seasonal adjustment recommendations, (3) how much reserve I should keep. Be specific with dollar amounts.

sections.title: System 04: Sales & Lead Follow-Up
sections.problem: 80% of sales need 5+ follow-ups, but most businesses stop at 1-2
sections.solution: A 5-touch follow-up sequence with templates for each stage
whats_inside: 5-touch follow-up sequence with full email templates
Lead scoring cheat sheet (hot / warm / cool)

follow_up_sequence.name: Initial Response
follow_up_sequence.template:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thanks for reaching out to [YOUR BUSINESS]! I saw your question about [their specific inquiry].

[Direct answer to their question — be specific]

I'd love to learn more about what you're looking for. Would you be open to [sharing a few more details]?

Looking forward to hearing from you,
[YOUR NAME]
[YOUR PHONE / BOOKING LINK]

follow_up_sequence.name: Value-Add Follow-Up
follow_up_sequence.goal: Build trust by giving, not asking
follow_up_sequence.template:
Hi [Customer Name],

I was thinking about [their situation/question] and wanted to share something that might help:

[helpful resource related to their need — NOT a sales pitch]

A lot of our customers in [similar situation] have found this really helpful. No strings attached — just thought of you.

Let me know if you have any questions!
[YOUR NAME]

follow_up_sequence.name: Social Proof
follow_up_sequence.template:
Hi [Customer Name],

Quick thought — I wanted to share how we helped [similar customer/business] with [similar need]:

"[2-3 sentences about the result they achieved]"
— [Customer name/business], [their role]

Their situation was similar to yours, and I think we could get you similar results.

Worth a conversation? I'm free [times]. Happy to keep it to 15 minutes.

[YOUR NAME]

follow_up_sequence.name: Direct Ask
follow_up_sequence.template:
Hi [Customer Name],

I wanted to check in one more time about [their need].

Based on what you shared, here's what I'd recommend:
[Specific product/service recommendation with price]

[Urgency element: 'We have 2 spots left this month' or 'Our seasonal offer runs through [date]']

If you'd like to move forward, here's the easiest way: [specific next step — book a call, reply, visit]

And if now isn't the right time, no worries at all — I'll be here when you're ready.

[YOUR NAME]

follow_up_sequence.name: Long-Term Nurture
follow_up_sequence.goal: Stay top of mind without being pushy
follow_up_sequence.template:
Hi [Customer Name],

Hope you're doing well! No sales pitch today — just wanted to share something I thought you'd find useful:

[helpful resource, tip, or community event related to their interest]

If your needs around [their original question] ever come back up, I'm always happy to help.

Have a great [day/week]!
[YOUR NAME]

sections.follow_up_ai_prompt: Using my Business Profile, write a [Touch 1/2/3/4/5] follow-up email for this lead: [paste lead details]. Match my brand tone. Keep it under 80 words. The goal is [proof / close / nurture].

hot.label: HOT — Follow Up Today
signals: Visited or contacted you twice or more

warm.label: WARM — Follow Up This Week
signals: Downloaded your content or signed up
Asked general questions about your services
Engaged with your social media content

lead_scoring.pro_tip: Create three saved AI prompts — one for each lead temperature. When a new lead comes in, classify them, then use the matching prompt to generate a personalized response in seconds.

proposal_template.description: Stop spending hours on proposals. Paste your discovery call notes and let AI draft a professional proposal in minutes.
proposal_template.ai_prompt: Using my Business Profile and this template, draft a proposal for: [describe the client request]. Match our brand tone. Recommend the right service/product combo. Include a 14-day validity period.

sections.title: System 05: Operations & SOP System
sections.problem: Everything lives in your head — if you're sick, the business stops
sections.solution: AI-generated SOPs from your verbal descriptions
sections.time_saved: Major — building a business that runs without you
whats_inside: Top 10 SOPs every small business needs

sop_generator_workflow.detail: Talk like you're training a new employee. Record yourself explaining the task from start to finish.
Use speech-to-text or a free transcription tool. Paste the raw text into AI along with the SOP template.
AI organizes your rambling into a clean, step-by-step procedure anyone can follow.

sop_template.name: [Process Name]
sop_template.exceptions: [What to do when things go wrong]

sections.sop_ai_prompt: I'm going to describe my [PROCESS NAME] process. Here's my raw description: [paste transcript]. Using the SOP template, organize this into a clean, step-by-step procedure. Include expected outputs, exceptions, and a time estimate.
training_checklist: Shared the SOP document with team member
Walked through the process together once
Team member completed process with supervision
Reviewed quality of first 3 independent outputs
sections.pro_tip: Use AI to generate a quiz from any SOP. Paste the SOP and ask: 'Create a 5-question quiz to test understanding of this procedure.' Great for training verification.

sections.title: System 06: Hiring & Team Management
sections.problem: Hiring takes weeks and you still pick the wrong person
sections.solution: AI-assisted hiring pipeline — from posting to onboarding in half the time
sections.job_description_ai_prompt: Using my Business Profile and this role template, write a job description for [ROLE]. Match our brand tone [BRAND TONE]. Include what makes working here different. Under 300 words. Make skills specific and measurable.

role_specific: Describe a time you [KEY SKILL] — what was the result?
What tools/methods do you use for [CORE RESPONSIBILITY]?
Walk me through how you'd approach [REAL TASK].
What's the biggest [SKILL] challenge you've solved?
culture_fit: What kind of work environment brings out your best?
How do you handle [BRAND TONE-RELATED SCENARIO]?
Describe a team you loved — what made it great?
How do you handle feedback you disagree with?
What would your last manager say is your biggest strength?

fields.role_scores: Role Q1: [/5] Role Q2: [/5] Role Q3: [/5] Role Q4: [/5] Role Q5: [/5]
fields.culture_scores: Culture Q1: [/5] Culture Q2: [/5] Culture Q3: [/5] Culture Q4: [/5] Culture Q5: [/5]

week_1.title: Orientation
tasks: Complete all paperwork and system access
Tour of workspace / intro to team
Review Business Profile and brand values
Shadow existing team member for 2 days
Read SOPs for their role (from Chapter 06)

week_2.title: Supervised Work
tasks: Review and practice all relevant SOPs

week_3.title: Independent Work
tasks: Check-in reduced to every other day

week_4.title: First Review
tasks: Discuss wins, challenges, and next goals
Adjust training plan based on performance

sections.title: Chapter 08: Industry Quick-Start Guides
sections.content: Don't know where to start? Find your industry below. We've prioritized the systems and added industry-specific extras.

industry_specific_additions: Menu update and seasonal special templates
Staff scheduling SOP with peak-hour coverage
industries.quick_start_prompt: I run a [TYPE] restaurant with [X] staff. Busiest days: [DAYS]. Brand voice: [TONE]. Customize the Customer Response System for: reservation inquiries, dietary restriction questions, complaint about food quality, and catering requests.

I run a [TYPE] retail store (online/physical/both) selling [PRODUCTS]. Average order: $[X]. Customize the Sales & Lead Follow-Up System for: abandoned cart follow-up, post-purchase thank you, seasonal promotion, and restock notification.

industry_specific_additions: Testimonial collection and case study builder
industries.quick_start_prompt: I run a [TYPE] service business. Average project: $[X] over [TIMELINE]. Customize the Operations & SOP System for: client intake, project kickoff, milestone check-in, and project completion/handoff.

industry_specific_additions: Rate calculator and pricing confidence builder

sections.title: Chapter 09: Your AI Operations Manual
sections.content: Your master control panel. Track which systems you've deployed, how much time you're saving, and when to review.
sections.pro_tip: Print this page or keep it as a pinned document. Update it monthly. The businesses that succeed with AI aren't the ones with the best tools — they're the ones who review and iterate.

review_your_systems: Check each active system — still saving time?
Review AI outputs — quality still good?
Check if any system should be activated or paused
update_your_foundation: Review and update your Business Profile
Update pricing, products, or services if changed
Refresh brand tone and messaging if evolved
optimize_and_expand: Train new team members on AI systems
measure_your_results: Calculate total hours saved this month
Note revenue attributed to AI systems

sections.title: Chapter 10: What's Next
sections.content: The Automation Ladder — You've been climbing. Here's where you are and what's next.

automation_ladder.name: Manual AI
automation_ladder.description: You type prompts one at a time

automation_ladder.name: Automated AI
automation_ladder.description: Systems run on autopilot with triggers

sections.pro_tip: You don't need Level 4 to see massive results. Most businesses save 15-20 hours/week with Level 3 systems. Automation is the cherry on top.

sections.title: Upsell / CTA
sections.content: Coming Next: AI Automation Cookbook — You've built the systems. Now let them run without you. The AI Automation Cookbook connects your systems to triggers, schedules, and multi-tool workflows.

upcoming_product.name: AI Automation Cookbook
features: Multi-tool workflows (connect AI to your existing tools)
Auto-triggers: new customer → welcome sequence → follow-up
Scheduled reports that run while you sleep
Advanced prompt chains for complex business decisions

items.description: All 4 products + future updates. vs. $162 buying separately.
